'''ngaguju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yokewood|yokewood]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-g-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yokewood|yokewood]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngaguju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngægijith|ngægijith]] || [[word:ngægijij|ngægijij]] || [[word:ngægijish|ngægijish]] || [[word:ngægiji|ngægiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngagugujuth|ngagugujuth]] || [[word:ngagugujuj|ngagugujuj]] || [[word:ngagugujush|ngagugujush]] || [[word:ngaguguju|ngaguguju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngagujuth|ngagujuth]] || [[word:ngagujuj|ngagujuj]] || [[word:ngagujush|ngagujush]] || [[word:ngaguju|ngaguju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngagufjuth|ngagufjuth]] || [[word:ngagufjuj|ngagufjuj]] || [[word:ngagufjush|ngagufjush]] || [[word:ngagufjuf|ngagufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngagujuthu|ngagujuthu]] || [[word:ngagujuju|ngagujuju]] || [[word:ngagujushu|ngagujushu]] || [[word:ngagujuku|ngagujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngagujuth|ngagujuth]] || [[word:ngagujuj|ngagujuj]] || [[word:ngagujush|ngagujush]] || [[word:ngaguju|ngaguju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngagujuthul|ngagujuthul]] || [[word:ngagujujul|ngagujujul]] || [[word:ngagujushul|ngagujushul]] || [[word:ngagujukul|ngagujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngagujuthuthu|ngagujuthuthu]] || [[word:ngagujujuju|ngagujujuju]] || [[word:ngagujushushu|ngagujushushu]] || [[word:ngagujuku|ngagujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngagujuthun|ngagujuthun]] || [[word:ngagujujun|ngagujujun]] || [[word:ngagujushun|ngagujushun]] || [[word:ngagujukun|ngagujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngagujuthuoro|ngagujuthuoro]] || [[word:ngagujujuoro|ngagujujuoro]] || [[word:ngagujushuoro|ngagujushuoro]] || [[word:ngagujukuoro|ngagujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
